title: After the Takarazuka Kinen: Helming the Ship

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan is making an aggressive bid for the
front! What's going to happen as they take this
third corner?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hyaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ngh!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(So you're not even gonna give me a second to
catch my breath, huh? You've got first place in
your sights.)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Aha... Honestly, this is even tougher than when
we faced off at the Derby!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: (...And I know why.)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
This whole time, Ryan has been honing her skills
in the world of racing.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
While I was goofing off, and at the Arima Kinen
and the spring Tenno Sho—all this time, she's
been racing against herself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: RAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(This is the strength of someone who's lived with
the weight of expectations on her shoulders!)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...But you're not the only one.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: (Nothing... held... back!)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: GRAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ngh... Ha... Ahaha!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(Faster... I want to be faster! I want to be faster
than anyone alive!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Wonder if those two were watching as well...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ah!

text_block_list.name: Spectator in Suit
text_block_list.text: You ran very well, Ines. Incredibly well!

text_block_list.name: Ramen Shop Owner
text_block_list.text: Whoo! That was pretty great, kid!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much for coming today, everyone!
I'll be sure to keep doing my best!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(Whoops. I was going to say that right after the
race finished!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...I hope that was enough. I hope my running
inspired them to dream!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: You really do love running, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! I want to make everyone happy the
next time I run, too!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
What kind of race do you think I should try next?
Got any suggestions?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin comes bounding into the waiting room
still full of energy. That's how I know we're on the
right track with this plan.
choice_data_list: Well, what kind of race do you want?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huh? What kind of race do I want? Uhh...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I'm more interested in hearing what kind
of race everyone else would be happy to see me
run in...
choice_data_list: I'd like to see you run a race you enjoy!
I'd like to see you run a race you enjoy!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin tilts her head in confusion. Before we
do anything else, I decide to have her rest for the
day. We can discuss our goal another time.

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text:
"In such cases, one of the neighboring owners
may..." Ugh, I can't! This is definitely not
lunch-break reading.

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text: Oh, Ines! You're working this afternoon? Yay!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Yep, yep!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yeah! So, if you could choose, what kind of
race would you want to see me enter next?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Basically, I want to run in a race that all the
people supporting me want to see me in.

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text: Huh? Like, any race would be fine by me! Wait, so this means you're gonna, like, run in another race, right? You better tell us which one the second you choose!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Really? Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
The autumn Tenno Sho, the Queen Elizabeth II
Cup, the Mile Championship, the Japan Cup...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Why are there are so many fall G1s?! Would it be
inspiring if I tried my hand at a new distance? Or
maybe a more prestigious race would...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Haha. You're really stewing on this one, huh,
Ines?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ryan! How'd your doctor's appointment go?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
There's some inflammation in my legs, so I'm
supposed to take it easy. But I'll be running again
in no time!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But anyway, what's your next race gonna be?
C'mon, you gotta tell me!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Well, the thing is... I have no idea.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I want to run in a race that would make everyone
happy, but I have no idea which one would be
best.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hm... What if you flipped that around?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Instead of trying to figure out which race would make people happy, how about figuring out how you want to make them happy?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
...Or something like that. Sorry, I'm not trying to
talk down to you or anything.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Not at all! I think you're on to something! You
always know what to say, Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I want to run in the autumn Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Everyone traveled really far to support me at the
Takarazuka Kinen and the Asahi Hai F.S., right?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
So I figured if I ran in some Tokyo races, it'd be
way easier for them to come cheer me on.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Plus, the fall Tenno's all about speed, right? I
can't wait to try running in a race like that!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...But do you think that reason's a little flimsy?
Should I be thinking on more of a grand scale?
choice_data_list:
Nope, that's perfect! Let's take on the autumn
Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ohoho! Yay! ♪ I'm glad you're excited too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
More important than the name or prestige of a
race is whether or not she actually wants to run in
it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So if she wants to go for the Tenno Sho, I'm sure
she'll run true to herself.
